name: Yubo International Biotech Ltd
summary: Yubo International Biotech Limited is a U.S. holding company (New York corporation) that operates in China through contractual arrangements with its VIE, Yubo International Biotech (Beijing) Limited. The company conducts biotechnology and biomedical operations in China via subsidiaries including Yubo Phoenix, Yubo Jingzhi, and Yubo Shenzhen. Day-to-day business operations are conducted by Yubo Beijing in China. The holding company structure uses VIE arrangements due to PRC restrictions on direct foreign investment in certain industries.
